assertions.description: The analyzer detects the I2C bus on SDA and SCL nets routed through J1 (OLED header) and J2. It correctly notes has_pull_up=false for both lines and flags them in design_observations, since the schematic contains no pull-up resistors on SDA or SCL. The XIAO-ESP32 module's internal pull-ups are relied upon here.

INCORRECT: The test_coverage section lists J2 (Conn_02x06_Odd_Even) in debug_connectors with connected_nets=['+3.3V', '+5V', 'GND', 'GND', 'SDA', 'SCL', 'CSn', 'TX', 'MOSI', 'MISO', 'SCK', 'RX']. Despite this, covered_nets=[] and uncovered_key_nets includes SDA, SCL, TX, MOSI, MISO, SCK, RX, +3.3V, +5V — all of which are present in J2's connected_nets. The algorithm populates debug_connectors correctly but fails to update covered_nets from the connector's exposed nets, making the coverage report entirely misleading.
